nasb.text: But the Lord your God you shall fear; and He will deliver you from the hand of all your enemies.”

esv.text: but you shall fear the Lord your God, and he will deliver you out of the hand of all your enemies.”

cnv.text: 但要敬畏耶和華你們的　神，他必救你們脫離所有仇敵的手。”

ccb.text: 我是你们的上帝耶和华，你们要敬拜我，我必从一切仇敌手中救你们。”
